title: The Cycle of AI Coding Burnout
summary: A developer experiences the full emotional cycle of AI-assisted coding: amazement, hype, panic, death, and immediately opening nvim again.

panels.artPrompt: Dev, a human software developer with simple rectangular glasses, leans curiously toward a terminal laptop in a pure black terminal room while Clanker, a helpful boxy robot assistant with screen eyes and antenna, offers a small terminal cursor suggestion.
panels.composition: Dev left, Clanker right, laptop centered, calm sparse background, empty dark upper area for a small speech bubble.

panels.artPrompt: Dev throws both arms up in excited amazement at the terminal laptop while Clanker stands confidently beside it, pure black background with clean terminal line energy.
panels.composition: Excited Dev on the left, confident Clanker on the right, bright terminal cursor between them, empty top area for speech bubble.

panels.artPrompt: The neon terminal room becomes chaotic: Dev is overwhelmed with panic posture and sweat marks while Clanker overclocks with green sparks, screen eyes intense, terminal laptop erupts with sparse sparks.
panels.composition: Panicked Dev left foreground, overclocked Clanker right, sparks around the center laptop, empty top area for a large speech bubble.

panels.artPrompt: Dev lies flat on the floor in cartoon burnout with X-eye energy while Clanker stands nearby looking concerned, smoke curls from the terminal laptop in a sparse black neon terminal room.
panels.composition: Collapsed Dev across the lower left, concerned Clanker on the right, smoky laptop in the middle, dark empty top area for caption.
panels.caption: dead

panels.artPrompt: Dev has resurrected and is already typing at the laptop again with tired determination while Clanker watches silently, boot-up cursor and terminal line energy returning to the black neon room.
panels.composition: Dev seated left at laptop typing, Clanker watching on the right, terminal boot cursor centered, empty top area for speech bubble.
